files.input_klines.parquet: Multi-symbol OHLCV input (the only data engine should consume)
files.input_funding.parquet: Per-symbol per-4h-bar summed hourly funding rates
files.expected_indicators.json: ATR(14) reference values at 50 sample bars
files.expected_regime.json: GMM fit results: K*, BIC table, label distribution
files.expected_trades.json: Trade lists from canonical, V41, and funding-aware simulators on CCI_ETH
files.expected_equity.json: Equity curve sample points from each simulator
files.expected_v52_blend.json: End-to-end V52 blend headline metrics + 100 equity samples

test_order: 2. CCI/ST/BB signals — proves signal logic correct
3. New signals (MFI/VP/SVD) — proves new signal logic correct
4. Regime — proves classifier deterministic with seed=42
5. Canonical simulator trades — proves engine semantics correct
6. V41 simulator trades — proves regime-adaptive exits correct
7. Funding simulator trades — proves funding accrual correct
8. V52 final equity — proves end-to-end integration correct
